title: pilosella huberi
intro: Pilosella huberi, also known as the lesser knapweed or Pilosella, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella huberi can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
